addon:addon.name: Jellyfin Binding
addon:addon.description: Binding for Jellyfin, the free and open-source media server. Integrates active client sessions for playback control and now-playing status.

parameter-group.name: discovery
parameter-group.label: Discovery
parameter-group.description:
Fine-tune Jellyfin server discovery behaviour on the local network.

These settings only affect the UDP-based auto-discovery mechanism and do not change how the binding connects to the server over HTTP/HTTPS.

parameter.name: discoveryPort
parameter.label: Discovery Port
parameter.description:
UDP port used to broadcast discovery queries on the local network.

This is the Jellyfin auto-discovery port (default 7359), not the HTTP/HTTPS port used by the server for client connections.

parameter.name: discoveryTimeout
parameter.label: Discovery Timeout
parameter.description:
Maximum time (in milliseconds) to wait for discovery responses from servers on the network.

Shorter timeouts make discovery faster but may miss slow or busy devices; longer timeouts increase discovery latency.
